reasoning: The timeline for an Apple Vision Pro successor strongly points to a 2026 release. The original device launched in early 2024, suggesting an 18–24 month refresh cycle. Recent (Nov 2024) reporting from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman and supply chain analyst Ming-Chi Kuo point to an M5-powered Vision Pro refresh arriving "between Fall 2025 and Spring 2026." However, Apple traditionally announces flagship headsets well in advance of retail availability (the first Vision Pro had an 8-month gap). Therefore, even a Fall 2025 announcement would likely lead to an early 2026 retail release. Given the strict resolution criteria requiring the product to be "available for purchase by the general public" by December 31, 2025, the chances are very slim. The Polymarket estimate of 4% in late October strongly aligns with the consensus that it will slip into 2026. Therefore, I'm assigning a 4% probability.
